title: Per-component guideline _meta.yml (author-facing)
description: Schema for components/src/<slug>/_meta.yml — the per-component metadata + domain status matrix. One file per component directory. `domains` declares the status of every guideline domain; the deriver uses it to decide which domain source files to expect and how to project each domain.

category.description: Category slug. Joins to the category-defaults inheritance source. Optional — when omitted the deriver resolves it from the component registry.

section.description: Top-level Figma section the component lives under.

related.description: Related component slugs for cross-linking. Optional. Powers 'See also' nav on the docs site and cross-component context in the plugin's component-brief.

a11y_refs.description: Component-specific accessibility references by slug — the per-component tier of the two-tier a11y model. Foundation/cross-cutting slugs stay on the category; component-pattern slugs (buttons, modals, tabs, …) attach here. Each `ref` must exist in accessibility/dist/a11y-index.json (validated by tests/a11y-refs-coverage.test.js, not the schema). Mirrors the category-defaults `a11y_refs` field.

ref.description: Accessibility pattern slug. Must exist in accessibility/dist/a11y-index.json.

note.description: Optional component-specific note refining the generic pattern guidance.
examples: focus returns to trigger on close

examples.description: Canonical examples — Figma nodes or live URLs. Each entry needs a label plus at least one of {figmaNode, url}. Optional. Consumers (docs site, plugin) render these as an 'Examples' section / deep-links.

url.description: Absolute URL to a live/documented example.

lastReviewed.description: Date a domain owner last sanity-checked this component's guidance (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD). Optional. Surfaced in coverage.md as a staleness signal.

domains.description: The per-domain status matrix. Any domain may be omitted (treated as not-started). For draft|approved domains the matching source file must exist; for inherited|not-started it must not.

status.description: not-started = declared but empty; draft = authored, unreviewed; approved = team-signed-off; inherited = intentionally not component-specific, resolves to category-defaults.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date the domain source was last revised.
